mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, product_key, subject_type, subject_value, action, topic_pattern, effect, priority, enabled FROM iot_acl_policy WHERE enabled = 1 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND action = #{action} AND subject_type = 'device' AND (subject_value = #{subjectValue} OR subject_value = '*') ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO iot_acl_policy( tenant_id, product_key, subject_type, subject_value, action, topic_pattern, effect, priority, enabled, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{productKey}, #{subjectType}, #{subjectValue}, #{action}, #{topicPattern}, #{effect}, #{priority}, #{enabled}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select: SELECT id, tenant_id, product_key, subject_type, subject_value, action, topic_pattern, effect, priority, enabled FROM iot_acl_policy WHERE enabled = 1 AND is_delete = 0 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND subject_type = 'product' ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC

SELECT id, tenant_id, product_key, subject_type, subject_value, action, topic_pattern, effect, priority, enabled FROM iot_acl_policy WHERE is_delete = 0 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND subject_type = 'product' ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC

SELECT id, tenant_id, product_key, subject_type, subject_value, action, topic_pattern, effect, priority, enabled FROM iot_acl_policy WHERE is_delete = 0 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND subject_type = 'device' AND subject_value = #{deviceKey} ORDER BY priority DESC, id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE iot_acl_policy SET effect = #{effect}, enabled = #{enabled}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_delete = 0 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND subject_type = 'product'

UPDATE iot_acl_policy SET topic_pattern = REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE( REPLACE(topic_pattern, '${deviceKey}', #{deviceKey}), '${device_key}', #{deviceKey}), '${DEVICEKEY}', #{deviceKey}), '${DEVICE_KEY}', #{deviceKey}), '{deviceKey}', #{deviceKey}), '{device_key}', #{deviceKey}), '{DEVICEKEY}', #{deviceKey}), '{DEVICE_KEY}', #{deviceKey}), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE is_delete = 0 AND product_key = #{productKey} AND subject_type = 'device' AND subject_value = #{deviceKey} AND ( topic_pattern LIKE '%${deviceKey}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%${device_key}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%${DEVICEKEY}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%${DEVICE_KEY}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%{deviceKey}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%{device_key}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%{DEVICEKEY}%' OR topic_pattern LIKE '%{DEVICE_KEY}%' )
UPDATE iot_acl_policy SET is_delete = 1, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE product_key = #{productKey} AND is_delete = 0
